strategies.name: Congress Buys
strategies.description: Tracks recent stock purchases by members of Congress, weighted by reported purchase size with weekly rebalancing.

strategies.name: Dan Meuser
strategies.description: Mirrors the portfolio of Rep. Dan Meuser (and family), rebalanced when new trades or annual reports are reported.

strategies.name: Sector Weighted DC Insider
strategies.description: Tracks aggregated insider trading activity weighted by sector allocation with weekly rebalancing.

strategies.name: Michael Burry
strategies.description: Mirrors Scion Asset Management's portfolio using 13F filings, rebalanced when new filings are reported.

strategies.name: Lobbying Spending Growth
strategies.description: Invests in companies with growing lobbying budgets, identifying firms increasing political influence.

strategies.name: Transportation and Infra. Committee (House)
strategies.description: Tracks stocks purchased by current/past members of the U.S. House's Transportation and Infrastructure Committee (or their family). Weighted based on reported purchase size, with weekly rebalancing.

strategies.name: U.S. House Long-Short
strategies.description: Tracks stocks purchased or sold by U.S. House members (or family). Long position in purchases, short position in sales. Employs leverage with 130% long exposure and 30% short exposure, with weekly rebalancing.

strategies.name: Top Gov Contract Recipients
strategies.description: Selects top 20 government contract recipients, weighted by contract values. Uses exponential moving average to favor recent contracts while weighing historical ones. Rebalanced monthly.

strategies.name: Donald Beyer
strategies.description: Mirrors the portfolio of Rep. Don Beyer (and family). Rebalanced when new trades or annual reports are reported.

strategies.name: Josh Gottheimer
strategies.description: Mirrors the portfolio of Rep. Josh Gottheimer (and family). Rebalanced when new trades or annual reports are reported.

strategies.name: Top Lobbying Spenders
strategies.description: Equal-weighted position in 10 publicly-traded companies with most lobbying spending over the last quarter. Rebalanced monthly.

strategies.name: Nancy Pelosi
strategies.description: Mirrors the portfolio of Rep. Nancy Pelosi (and family). Rebalanced when new trades or annual reports are reported.

strategies.name: Sheldon Whitehouse
strategies.description: Mirrors the portfolio of Senator Sheldon Whitehouse (and family). Rebalanced when new trades or annual reports are reported.

strategies.name: Howard Marks
strategies.description: Mirrors Howard Marks's Oaktree Capital Management portfolio using 13F filings. Rebalanced when new filings are reported.

strategies.name: Bill Ackman
strategies.description: Mirrors Bill Ackman's Pershing Square Capital Management portfolio using 13F filings. Rebalanced when new filings are reported.

strategies.name: Wall Street Conviction
strategies.description: Uses 13F filings for institutions with $100M+ holdings to find each fund's highest conviction stock in the S&P500. Conviction measured as portfolio allocation minus S&P500 allocation. Equal-weighted positions, rebalanced quarterly 47 days after quarter end.
